name: Satish's SME Corner : Notes and Con-call Updates

posts.author: Marathondreams
posts.community: Satish's SME Corner : Notes and Con-call Updates
posts.text: About PNGS Reva - Promoters are buying lots of shares from open market/block deals. In March 26, promoters bought 8,76,424 shares and in May 26 (till 18th May), they have purchased 3,22,000 shares. It is interesting to note that IPO ( which came in last week Feb 2026) was entirely fresh issue of 98 Lakh shares. This means promoters did not sell a single share during IPO and are buying large quantities post listing in open market. This is huge vote of confidence shown by promoters.
